location: Inside a chest guarded by three Lesser Crystallians, past a mass of tree roots just south of the Elphael Inner Wall Site of Grace, Elphael, Brace of the Haligtree.

source.name: Chest guarded by 3 Lesser Crystallians, Elphael Inner Wall

tactics: From the Elphael Inner Wall grace, head south down the stairs and turn left past the large root formation to find the chest.
Three Lesser Crystallians guard it and can inflict Scarlet Rot — consider pulling them one at a time or picking them off at range.
It's a straightforward chest, not a mimic — just a well-guarded pickup.
lore: A sword of pure crystal — a construction impossible for human hands — left to fester with scarlet rot, its magic-infused blade carrying the same corruption that plagues the Haligtree itself.

builds.name: Int/Rot status hybrid
builds.why: D Strength / E Dexterity / D Intelligence scaling plus built-in Scarlet Rot buildup on every hit make it a strong status-application weapon for Intelligence builds.
